title: IDP Education India International Enterprises is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: IDP Education India International Enterprises is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at IDP Education India International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About IDP Education India International Enterprises:
IDP Education India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IDP Education India International Enterprises!
